title: ROCK VARNISH GEOCHEMICAL PROVENANCE ANALYSIS
what: XRD and XRF investigation of Fe/Mn stratigraphic layering in rock varnish
Provenance analysis of steatite archaeological artifacts
how: X-ray diffraction (2.0–7.5 Å) and XRF elemental mapping
Comparative elemental analysis across 10+ artifact samples
results: Fe/Mn stratigraphic layering identified in 6 samples — consistent with Younger Dryas formation
10+ steatite artifacts traced to Rhode Island quarry sources
10–45× elemental variation distinguishing regional clay sources and trade patterns
